nasb.text: Because the foolishness of God is wiser than men, and the weakness of God is stronger than men.

esv.text: For the foolishness of God is wiser than men, and the weakness of God is stronger than men.

cnv.text: 因為　神的愚笨總比人智慧，　神的軟弱總比人剛強。

ccb.text: 因为上帝的“愚昧”也胜过世人的智慧，上帝的“软弱”也胜过世人的刚强。

csbs.text: 因为神的愚拙比人更智慧，神的软弱比人更强壮。
